calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-31-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:27 am, pausing at 9:36 am, resuming at 9:43 am, pausing at 9:45 am, resuming at 10:00 am and concluding at 10:28 am.

Plaintiff Star One Credit Union is represented by Samuel Sazer, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Scott Moulton not appearing.

ANDREW SHAW is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Star One Credit Union, and against Defendant Scott Moulton, as follows:

1. Damages: $75,681.73
2. Prejudgment Interest: $8,501.24
3. Costs: $1,037.50
4. Attorney fees: $5,000.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $90,220.50

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Continued To Mar-19-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-13-2024 Continued To Jan-31-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:46 am and concluding at 9:54 am

Plaintiff Star One Credit Union is represented by Samuel Sazer, Esq. via Zoom video conference.
Defendant Scott Moulton not appearing.

ANDREW SHAW is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The Court requires more evidence and documentation to proceed.

The Court continues this matter to January 31, 2025 at 9:00 am in Dept 505. Counsel for Plaintiff to submit supplemental declaration and additional evidence five days prior to new hearing date. (D505)
